one_liner_ptbr: Camada de operacao e governanca para sistemas de IA por dominio, com trilha de auditoria e gate humano.
one_liner_en: A governance-first operations layer for running separated domain AI systems with auditability and human gates.

public_title: Scenario Simulation and Digital Twin Workspace
one_liner_ptbr: Workspace de simulacao de cenarios que combina insumo estruturado, agentes simulados e evidencia para explorar futuros possiveis.
one_liner_en: A scenario analysis workspace that uses structured inputs, simulated agents, and layered evidence to explore possible futures.

one_liner_ptbr: Assistente analitico orientado a documentos, com ingestao estruturada, recuperacao de contexto e painel de evidencias auditavel.
one_liner_en: A document-aware analytical assistant that combines retrieval, structured ingestion, and audit-friendly evidence panels.

one_liner_ptbr: Workspace clinico para interpretacao de gasometria e exames associados, com motor deterministico e apoio controlado de IA.
one_liner_en: A clinical analysis workspace for blood gas interpretation and related exam review with deterministic support and controlled AI assistance.

public_title: Healthcare Unit Operations and Indicator Management
one_liner_ptbr: Aplicacao web para gestao de unidade de saude que transforma indicadores fragmentados em monitoramento, acao, revisao e melhoria continua.
one_liner_en: A web application for healthcare unit management that turns fragmented operational indicators into monitored action, review, and improvement cycles.

public_title: Regulatory Exposure Calculator for Crypto P2P Operators
one_liner_ptbr: Calculadora juridico-operacional para estimar exposicao regulatoria e caminhos de decisao em operacoes P2P de criptoativos.
one_liner_en: A legal-operational calculator that helps assess regulatory exposure and decision paths for crypto P2P activity.

one_liner_ptbr: Workspace faseado de decisao em M&A seller-side, combinando memoria, disciplina documental e raciocinio assistido por agentes.
one_liner_en: A phase-based M&A decision workspace that combines memory, document discipline, and agent-assisted reasoning for seller-side work.

public_title: Priority Matrix for Structured Decision Making
one_liner_ptbr: Aplicativo web enxuto para priorizar problemas e iniciativas por meio de uma matriz GUT estruturada.
one_liner_en: A lightweight web app for prioritizing issues and initiatives through a structured GUT framework.

one_liner_ptbr: Construtor estruturado de Ishikawa que transforma entradas guiadas em saidas consistentes em SVG e PNG.
one_liner_en: A structured Ishikawa builder that turns guided inputs into consistent SVG and PNG outputs.

public_title: Legal Dossier and Case Operations Workspace
one_liner_ptbr: Workspace multi-tenant de operacao juridica para dossies, documentos, calculos e fluxos assistidos por IA.
one_liner_en: A multi-tenant legal operations workspace for dossiers, documents, calculations, and controlled AI-assisted workflows.

one_liner_ptbr: Plataforma multi-tenant de analise documental com recuperacao de contexto, perguntas guiadas e revisao operacional controlada.
one_liner_en: A multi-tenant analysis platform that answers over document context with retrieval, guided prompts, and controlled operational review.
